retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Microfilmed periodically; continually maintained in Director''s office in paper format ; Microform: Microfilm is continually maintained in LSC Library from 1947 1/22/2003. Security copy of microfilm State Archives or other offsite storage site. ; Electronic: Beginning with 10/14/2003 minutes are scanned in a tif format. Additionally all previous minutes that were microfilmed were also scanned. Agency continually maintains a DVD of tif images and an online archive of tif images in a directory managed by LSC Library. Security copy of DVD State Archives or other offsite storage site
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Permanent ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent
